visa_types.name: Work Permit – Extended service
visa_types.documents_required:
Click here for the Checklist
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR TEMPORARY EMPLOYMENT IN MALTA
The applicant shall ensure that prior to applying for an appointment on the online appointment portal for D-Visa Processing, a valid Approval in Principle (AIP) letter issued by Identita, Malta is in hand. The said AIP shall remain valid until the date of the appointment booking and shall be presented at the Visa Application Centre (VAC) offered by VFS. Any AIP letters which are deemed to have expired on the date of appointment shall not be accepted and as such it will not be possible for the applicant to proceed with the booked appointment. Any applicable fees paid at application stage are non-refundable. As per the instruction received from Identita, Malta, VFS Centers will not accept any application without the Identita, Malta Original work permit.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Work Permit – Extended service]
The applicable VISA Fee in Nepalese Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Applicant shall be levied a Service charge at the visa application center during application process.
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.

Click here for the photo specification

Declaration of Proof Form

Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The extended service allows applicants wishing to apply for an Employment visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta .
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The extended service allows applicants wishing to apply for an Employment visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta . 

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Work Permit – Extended service]
The applicable VISA Fee in Nepalese Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Applicant shall be levied a Service charge at the visa application center during application process.
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.

Click here for the photo specification

Declaration of Proof Form

## Documents Required
Click here for the Checklist
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR TEMPORARY EMPLOYMENT IN MALTA
The applicant shall ensure that prior to applying for an appointment on the online appointment portal for D-Visa Processing, a valid Approval in Principle (AIP) letter issued by Identita, Malta is in hand. The said AIP shall remain valid until the date of the appointment booking and shall be presented at the Visa Application Centre (VAC) offered by VFS. Any AIP letters which are deemed to have expired on the date of appointment shall not be accepted and as such it will not be possible for the applicant to proceed with the booked appointment. Any applicable fees paid at application stage are non-refundable. As per the instruction received from Identita, Malta, VFS Centers will not accept any application without the Identita, Malta Original work permit.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However, applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification while they submit their application.
Click here for the photo specification

## Processing Time
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time. Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms
Malta Visa Application Form
Declaration of Proof Form

## To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.visa_fees:
Please Note: There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer document (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/malta-extended-services/nepal/english/pdf/visa_fees_others_new.pdf) 
for all applicable charges.
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website and the VFS service fee at the application center.
All payments will be collected in local currency (Cash or Card)
- The applicable visa fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee is non-refundable

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Please note that before applying for an appointment for “Other” category, please read through the correct checklist and keep your documents ready for your appointment. 
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Please note that before applying for an appointment for “Other” category, please read through the correct checklist and keep your documents ready for your appointment. 
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## VISA FEES
Please Note: There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer document (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/malta-extended-services/nepal/english/pdf/visa_fees_others_new.pdf) 
for all applicable charges.
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website and the VFS service fee at the application center.
All payments will be collected in local currency (Cash or Card)
- The applicable visa fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee is non-refundable

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Please click here
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the below checklist:
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR ADOPTION VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR BUSINESS VISAS
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR CITIZENSHIP/RESIDENCE PROGRAMMES
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR COURT VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR CULTURAL VISIT VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SPORT ACTIVITIES VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SPORT TRIALS VISA
  	DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR FAMILY MEMBERS (SPOUSE – WIFE/HUSBAND/REGISTERED PARTNER)
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR LONG TERM NON-TOURISM
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR TRAINING VISIT VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR HUMANITARIAN VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR MEDICAL VISAS

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR OFFICIAL/POLITICAL VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR RELIGIOUS VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SCIENTIFIC RESEARCH VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR DIPLOMATIC VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR LOST DOCUMENTS TO RE-ENTER MALTA
Declaration of refusal letter
Declaration of proof
Declaration for Seasonal Worker
Documentation required for Seasonal Workers
Documentation required for Working Holiday Visa

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification while they submit their application.
Children below the age of 1year need not be present in the Vac for biometrics process. However two photograph of the child needs to be submitted along with the application for further processing. Photo specification are given in the below link :

Click here for the photo specification

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time

Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time. Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms
Declaration of Proof Form

## To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
 Click here for the Visa application form

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The appointment system allows applicants wishing to apply for a Student visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta.
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
Ensure you use a card with international payments enabled to pay the visa fee during the appointment booking process.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
Important Note: Incomplete application will not be accepted over the counter.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The appointment system allows applicants wishing to apply for a Student visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta.
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
Ensure you use a card with international payments enabled to pay the visa fee during the appointment booking process.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
Important Note: Incomplete application will not be accepted over the counter.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Study / Training]
The applicable VISA Fee in Nepalese Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Applicant shall be levied a Service charge at the visa application center during application process.
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website.
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
Click here for the photo specification
Declaration of Proof Form

## Documents Required
Click here for the Checklist

Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here.

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
Your passport must not be older than 10 years also it must be valid for at least THREE MONTHS longer than the intended stay. Your passport must have at least TWO BLANK PAGES to affix the visa. 
- The Visa application form must be complete & duly signed by the applicant. (Both the parents must sign in case of minor applicants).
- Please ensure that you have photocopies of all your documents in equal number as the number of applications. For e.g. For 4 applicants there should be 4 copies of the sponsorship letter & other docs. 
- Please keep two photocopies of the passport ready before you reach the counter.
- Please keep the exact amount of change for the visa fee & VFS logistic fee ready with you.
- Please mention the name of the applicant & the passport number behind the draft (1 draft per applicant).
- Please fill out the courier address & SMS request slip in order to avail of the mentioned services.
- A COPY of the all the documents should be attached in EACH application.
- Adhaar card (along with a photocopy)
- Applicants are required to submit their bank statement along with the sponsor’s bank statement. In addition to this, also required the transaction receipt (If any) and the bank statement from which the funds have been transferred to Malta (specifically for students going to study in Malta). 
Note: If you are visiting more than one Schengen country, the transfer & accommodation details for all the countries should be mentioned & highlighted in the itinerary. 
Please highlight the specifics appended below in addition to Name of applicant & Passport Number on all the mentioned documents. 
- Itinerary: Date of Departure & Arrival & Check in & Check-out dates at the hotel
- Insurance: Date of birth /Duration of cover/Amount of coverage
 Click here for the photo specification

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification while they submit their application.
Children below the age of 1year need not be present in the Vac for biometrics process. However two photograph of the child needs to be submitted along with the application for further processing. Photo specification are given in the below link :

Click here for the photo specification

## Processing Time
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time. Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms
This page hosts the form required for your Visa Application. Please click on the relevant form to download your visa application form.
Visa Application Form

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Family reunification
visa_types.documents_required:
The extended service allows applicants wishing to apply for a family Reunification visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta
Please note that before applying for an appointment for Family Reunification category, you must get your Family reunification certificate approved by Identità. Click here (https://online.vfsevisa.com/mt/en/login) to begin the approval process for Family Reunion certificate.

for the detailed checklist
Documents required for Family Reunification applications as advised by Central Visa Unit at Identita, Malta
Family reunification certificate issued by Identita/DCEA
Bank Statement
Full Passport Copy
Original marriage certificate legalized in the country of origin.
Original birth certificate legalized in the country of origin.
Letter of invitation from the spouse in Malta, legalized/notarized by a notary or a lawyer in Malta.
Copy of the passport of the spouse in Malta Copy of the passport of the spouse/children in the country of origin.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Family reunification]
The applicable VISA Fee in Nepalese Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
Applicant shall be levied a Service charge at the visa application center during application process.
The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website.
The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
Click here for the photo specification
Declaration of Proof Form

Note: The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submitting of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the Central visa unit,Identita, Malta

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The extended service allows applicants wishing to apply for a family Reunification visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta in Malta.
Please note that before applying for an appointment for Family Reunification category, you must get your Family reunification certificate approved by Identità. Click here (https://online.vfsevisa.com/mt/en/login) to begin the approval process for Family Reunion certificate.
Important Note: Incomplete applications will not be accepted over the counter.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Family reunification]
The applicable VISA Fee in Nepalese Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
Applicant shall be levied a Service charge at the visa application center during application process.
The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website.
The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
Click here for the photo specification
Declaration of Proof Form

Note: The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submitting of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the Central visa unit,Identita, Malta

## Documents Required

Please note that before applying for an appointment for Family Reunification category, you must get your Family reunification certificate approved by Identità. Click here (https://online.vfsevisa.com/mt/en/login) to begin the approval process for Family Reunion certificate.

for the detailed checklist

Bank Statement
Full Passport Copy
Original marriage certificate legalized in the country of origin.
Original birth certificate legalized in the country of origin.
Letter of invitation from the spouse in Malta, legalized/notarized by a notary or a lawyer in Malta.
Copy of the passport of the spouse in Malta Copy of the passport of the spouse/children in the country of origin.

Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification while they submit their application.
Children below the age of 1year need not be present in the Vac for biometrics process. However two photograph of the child needs to be submitted along with the application for further processing. Photo specification are given in the below link :

## Processing Time
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time. Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)
